rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is a car than a bicycle?
rounds.fact: A bicycle weighs ~9 kg; an average car weighs ~1,400 kg — about 155× heavier. Yet both get you from A to B.

rounds.prompt: How many times taller is a 10-storey building than a standard door?
rounds.fact: A standard door is ~2 m tall; a 10-storey building is ~29 m — about 14.5× taller (roughly 3 m per floor).

rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is a Boeing 747 than a Mini Cooper?
rounds.fact: A Mini Cooper weighs ~1,350 kg; a loaded 747 weighs ~412,000 kg — about 305× heavier.

rounds.prompt: How many times larger is a football pitch than a tennis court?
rounds.fact: A tennis court is ~261 m²; a football pitch is ~7,140 m² (105×68 m) — about 27× larger in area.

rounds.prompt: How many times more storage does a 1TB hard drive have than a 3.5-inch floppy disk?
rounds.fact: A floppy disk holds 1.44 MB; a 1TB drive holds 1,048,576 MB — about 728,000× more. One terabyte = 728,000 floppy disks.
